calibration_metric: reliability (ECE) of sign confidence + Venn-Abers p0/p1 validity interval width.
caps: perturbations<=3000 test / subsample if needed; downstream genes full (fast).
data: data/raw/GWCD4i.DE_stats.h5ad (33983 target-contrasts x 10282 downstream genes; signed log_fc + adj_p_value layers).
method: HistGBR sign classifier trained on train fold (covariates: condition dummies, log_baseMean, log_n_cells, trans_effect_magnitude, base-predictor pred & residual). Calibrated on calib fold via isotonic + Venn-Abers multiprobability. Selective prediction: abstain where calibrated confidence < tau; sweep tau for selective-accuracy vs coverage.
primary_metric: selective accuracy vs coverage curve on TEST fold.
scope_expansion: Gate trusts effect MAGNITUDE; test whether SIGN of a perturbation's dominant downstream program can be calibrated with valid abstention.

sign_task_definition.defined_only_when: n_sig_downstream>=3 AND NOT distal_offtarget_flag AND NOT neighboring_gene_KD AND fold assigned
sign_task_definition.explicitly_NOT: NOT trivial self-knockdown sign (on-target always down) — on-target column zeroed before summation.
sign_task_definition.target: Sign of the NET dominant downstream PROGRAM response = sign(sum over significant downstream genes of signed log_fc), on-target knockdown column EXCLUDED per row.

success_bar: selective accuracy > marginal base rate (0.684) at useful coverage (>=50%) WITH valid calibration (ECE small, reliability monotone), strictly above trivial baselines.
title: Calibrated Direction/Sign Trust for CD4+ T-cell Perturb-seq (T1D) — pre-registration

trivial_guard.fold_split: gene-disjoint (train/calib/test); leave-gene-out analog of LODO. Verified: test∩train genes = 0.
trivial_guard.trivial_baseline_1: marginal majority-class base rate = 0.684 net-up (must beat WITH calibration).
trivial_guard.trivial_baseline_2: gene-identity memorization impossible because folds gene-disjoint; predicting from unseen-gene covariates only.
trivial_guard.trivial_baseline_3: predicted-magnitude covariates are the SAME space the magnitude gate uses — sign must add information beyond magnitude.
